game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **WINGSPAN (윙스팬)** Wingspan is a turn-based digital board game for 1-5 players, where each player manages a personal player board with three habitat rows (forest, grassland, wetland). Players use tap controls to select one of four actions per turn: play a bird card, gain food, lay eggs, or draw cards. Choosing an action activates its corresponding habitat, triggering the "when activated" powers of all birds previously placed in that row, from right to left, creating strategic chain combos. Players spend specific food tokens (e.g., 2 worms, 1 fish) to play bird cards, which then contribute points, provide passive benefits, or enable additional actions like laying up to 5 eggs per bird. The game proceeds through a fixed number of rounds, typically four, with points accumulated from played birds, eggs, cached food, and completed bonus cards or end-of-round goals, and the player with the highest total score at the end wins.
game_info.description: WINGSPAN is a strategic bird collection game where you build habitats and attract birds to your sanctuary. Play bird cards by spending food tokens, activate habitat rows to trigger bird powers, and collect eggs to score points. Complete 4 rounds of strategic turns to build the best bird sanctuary and achieve the highest score. Birds provide unique abilities and chain reactions when you activate their habitat row!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓/←/→): Navigate menus and select options
Space: Confirm selection / Take action
Z: Cancel / Go back
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including playing birds, gaining food, laying eggs, and drawing cards. Validates that all four primary actions work correctly and update game state appropriately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Cycles through all four available actions (play bird, gain food, lay eggs, draw cards) in sequence. Ensures food is collected before attempting to play birds. Alternates between actions to test the full game loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully executes all four action types multiple times throughout the game. Game state updates correctly for each action. Completes at least 2 full rounds without errors. No crashes or state inconsistencies.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully executes all four action types multiple times throughout the game. Game state updates correctly for each action. Completes at least 2 full rounds without errors. No crashes or state inconsistencies.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal winning strategy by maximizing points through strategic bird placement, egg laying, and habitat activation chains. Validates that the game can be won and GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritizes gaining food early, then plays high-value birds strategically across all three habitats. Focuses on laying eggs on birds that can hold them and activating habitats to trigger bird power chains. Manages resources efficiently to play maximum birds.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves a high score (50+ points) through optimal play. Successfully completes all 4 rounds. Reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. Demonstrates mastery of resource management and strategic bird placement.
